query:
SELECT
      ts,
      token_sold,
      round(amount_sold, 6)   AS amount_sold,
      token_bought,
      round(amount_bought, 6) AS amount_bought,
      round(amount_usd, 2)    AS amount_usd,
      trader,
      tx_hash
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_pool_explorer_swaps
    WHERE 1 = 1
      /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
    ORDER BY ts DESC
    LIMIT 200
